zh.Of,St. Ninians,Strlng,Scot: 英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾聖 尼尼安斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Thomsone於1554年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾聖 尼尼安斯時，她的父親John Alain de Cochrane16歲，母親Marion Thomson13歲。她於1575年與John Gilchrist在蘇格蘭斯林史爾聖 尼尼安斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1607年8月20日之後在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾加根諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Thomsone于1554年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾聖 尼尼安斯时，她的父亲John Alain de Cochrane16岁，母亲Marion Thomson13岁。她于1575年与John Gilchrist在苏格兰斯林史爾聖 尼尼安斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1607年8月20日之后在英国苏格兰斯林史爾加根諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Thomsone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thompson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Thomsone was born in 1554, in St Ninians, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, John Alain de Cochrane, was 16 and her mother, Marion Thomson, was 13. She married John Gilchrist in 1575, in St Ninians, Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 20 August 1607, in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Gilchrist en 1575, à St Ninians, Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 20 août 1607, à Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Thomsoneが1554年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスト ニニアンスで生まれた時，父John Alain de Cochraneは16歳，母Marion Thomsonは13歳であった。1575年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスト ニニアンスでJohn Gilchristと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1607年8月20日以後にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアガーグノックで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Thomsone(이)가 1554년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스트 니니누스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Alain de Cochrane(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marion Thomson(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1575년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스트 니니누스에서 John Gilchrist(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1607년 8월 20일 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 가건옥크에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Thomsone родилась в 1554 г. в местности ст нинянс, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Alain de Cochrane было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Thomson, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gilchrist в 1575 г. в местности ст нинянс, стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 20 августа 1607 г. в местности гаргуннокк, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
